description: The conversation token mechanism (convTokenRef) at lines 68-84 is used to prevent race conditions when switching conversations, but if a user rapidly switches conversations and sends messages, stale responses could still arrive and update the wrong conversation's messages. The token check happens in onSuccess but the optimistic update happens in onMutate without token validation.
successCriteria: The conversation token is captured at mutation start and validated before any state update
Optimistic message updates include the conversation ID and are rolled back if conversation changes
Messages from stale conversations are never added to the current conversation
